REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR JUL-11-2022 - TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE THROUGH COURTCALL FOR PLAINTIFF. NO OTHER APPEARANCE. CASE IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: D. LOK; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
